subject: service-observability
description: Source-backed design and review workflows for logs and metrics in production Go services.
details: Create an independently installable Go skillpack for designing and reviewing service observability without operating production systems. Use current OpenTelemetry and Go guidance, make correlation and cardinality tradeoffs explicit, preserve privacy boundaries, and produce reviewable designs and verification plans.

owns: Design and static review of application logging and metrics in Go services.
Source-backed verification plans for observability behavior in local and test environments.
excludes: Live incident response, production telemetry queries, alert ownership, and vendor procurement.
General Go service architecture unrelated to observability signals.
supportedEnvironments: Supported stable Go releases and current OpenTelemetry Go APIs
Local or test verification unless external access is separately approved

compatibility.notes: Core guidance is portable across supported clients; verification remains local unless external access is separately approved.

sourceRequirements.freshness: Recheck supported Go and OpenTelemetry versions during authoring and record access dates.

skills.name: go-structured-logging-design
skills.details: Design or review structured application logs, field conventions, severity, error representation, context propagation, privacy controls, and test evidence for a Go service.

useWhen: A Go service needs a new structured logging contract.
Existing log events need review for fields, severity, correlation, or privacy.
doNotUseWhen: The requested outcome is metric instrumentation or label-cardinality design.
The request requires live production log investigation or backend mutation.
supportedEnvironments: Supported stable Go releases in source, local, or test environments

skills.expectedOutput: A logging contract, prioritized findings, safe field examples, and an executable local verification plan.
successCriteria: Stable event fields are separated from unbounded values and sensitive payloads are excluded.
Routing is clearly separated from metric and live-investigation workflows.

shouldTrigger: Design a structured logging contract for this Go HTTP service.
Review these Go log events for stable fields, correlation, severity, and privacy.
shouldNotTrigger: Design bounded labels and aggregation for this service's request metrics.
Query our production log backend to diagnose the current incident.

constraints: Do not query or write to a production logging backend.
Do not place secrets or sensitive payloads in examples.

sourceRequirements.freshness: Recheck current Go logging and OpenTelemetry log guidance during authoring.

openai.shortDescription: Design safe structured logging for Go services
openai.defaultPrompt: Use $go-structured-logging-design to design or review structured logging for this Go service.

skills.name: go-metrics-instrumentation-design
skills.details: Design or review Go service metrics, semantic conventions, labels, cardinality budgets, aggregation, runtime instrumentation, and local test evidence.

useWhen: A Go service needs a metric contract or instrumentation plan.
Existing metrics need review for semantics, units, aggregation, or label cardinality.
doNotUseWhen: The requested outcome is structured log-event and field design.
The request requires creating dashboards, alerts, or production backend resources.
supportedEnvironments: Supported stable Go releases in source, local, or test environments

skills.expectedOutput: A metric inventory, cardinality analysis, prioritized findings, and an executable local verification plan.
successCriteria: Every proposed metric has an observable purpose, stable unit, bounded labels, and testable collection behavior.
Routing is clearly separated from logging and production-backend workflows.

shouldTrigger: Design request and dependency metrics for this Go service with bounded labels.
Review this Go instrumentation for semantic conventions, aggregation, and cardinality risk.
shouldNotTrigger: Design a structured logging event and field contract for this Go service.
Create production dashboards and alerts in our monitoring vendor.

constraints: Do not create dashboards, alerts, or production backend resources.
Keep verification local unless external access is separately approved.

sourceRequirements.freshness: Recheck current OpenTelemetry metric semantics and Go APIs during authoring.

openai.shortDescription: Design bounded metrics for Go services
openai.defaultPrompt: Use $go-metrics-instrumentation-design to design or review metrics for this Go service.
